/usr/bin/ar cr ../../lib/mips/libarith.a  CMakeFiles/arith.dir/bits.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/compare.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/convert.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/cray_fadd.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/cray_fdiv.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/cray_fmul.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/cvt.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/edition.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/ieee_fadd.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/ieee_fdiv.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/ieee_fmul.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/ieee_norm.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/ieee_sqrt.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/intrin.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/math.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/miscmath.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/strcvt.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/native.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/test_ar_intrin.c.o CMakeFiles/arith.dir/cray1_sim.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/mips/libarith.a
